name: Beefy Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 9-inch pie pan with pastry. Trim the edge and flute it.
2. Cook the ground beef with onion until lightly browned. Allow to cool slightly.
3. Combine the eggs with the tomato soup. Stir in the cooked beef and onion mixture until well blended.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared pie shell.
5. Bake at 375 degrees for 30 to 35 minutes, or until golden brown.
6. Serve hot.
